description: Co-WIN is India’s COVID-19 vaccination platform operated by the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare for registration, appointment scheduling, vaccination workflow, and certificate access. Its public site also links to vaccination statistics, certificate verification, and beneficiary self-service flows.
summary: cowin.gov.in exposes a public website/dashboard and documents a Co-WIN partner REST API surface, but the available public docs do not provide a current machine-readable spec or a clearly self-service developer credential flow on the cowin.gov.in domain.
